ordered_lines.text: Welcome to UltimateEQ! I am here to explain the server progression and should be consulted as you continue through it. What can I do for you today?
1. [Provide Information On Pre-Ultimate Progression].
2. [Provide Information On Ultimate Progression].
3. [Provide Information On Avatar Progression].
4. [Provide Information On Demigod Progression].
5. [Provide Information On God Progression].
6. [I Need My Ultimate Charm].
7. [I'd Like To Review My Progression Flags].
8. [GM - Grant All Progression Flags].
9. [GM - Delete All Progression Flags].
As a new player your first goal should be to tackle Pre-Ultimate Progression. This progression will require you to acquire & return to me some custom items from familiar raid targets.
The purpose of doing these progression [Tasks] is to help orient you with the basics of this server as well as to gain experience, AA's, and Tier 1 - 3 currency.

Here are the tasks available. Keep in mind these must be completed in order. Also, for your information, you do NOT need to do any key quests-all zones that task items drop in are freely available to all.
Task 1: [Complete Vanilla Progression].
Task 2: [Complete Kunark Progression].
Task 3: [Complete Velious Progression].
Task 4: [Complete Luclin Progression].
Task 5: [Complete Planes of Power Progression].
Return to me with the following to complete this task:
1. Nagafen's Head.
2. Innoruuk's Brain.
3. Cazic Thule's Eye.
4. Ultimate Charm.
You will receive 15 AA's and Ultimate Charm - Tier 1 as a reward.
2. Trakanon's Tail.
3. Phara'Dars' Tooth.
3. Venril Sathir's Belt.
4. Ultimate Charm - Tier 1.
You will receive 25 AA's and Ultimate Charm - Tier 2 as a reward.
1. The Statue's Helmet.
2. Tunare's Torn Dress.
3. Vulak's Scale.
4. Ultimate Charm - Tier 2.
You will receive 50 AA's and Ultimate Charm - Tier 3 as a reward.
1. Emperor Ssra's Idol.
2. Aten's Ring.
3. Grieg's Torn Parchment.
4. Ultimate Charm - Tier 3.
You will receive 100 AA's and Ultimate Charm - Tier 4 as a reward.
1. Rallos Zek's Axe.
2. Solusek's Burning Staff.
3. Fenin Ro's Burning Boots.
4. Ultimate Charm - Tier 4.
You will receive 150 AA's and Ultimate Charm - Tier 5 as a reward.
Here are the Ultimate Tasks available. Keep in mind these must be completed in order and only after you have completed Pre-Ultimate Progression!
Ultimate Task 1: [Obtain Access to Ultimate Zones Rank 1].
Ultimate Task 2: [Obtain Access to Ultimate Zones Rank 2].
Ultimate Task 3: [Obtain Access to Ultimate Zones Rank 3].
Ultimate Task 4: [Obtain Access to Ultimate Zones Rank 4].
Ultimate Task 5: [Obtain Access to Ultimate Zones Rank 5].

To obtain access to the Ultimate Rank 1 zones, Upper Guk and Lower Guk, you must complete the Crushbone Challenge, which is offered by [Quake]. This challenge is only accessible after completing Pre-Ultimate progression.
1. Before facing Crush the Transformed you must first defeat Dvinn the Tormentor and Ser Darish the Black.
2. Next, defeat Crush the Transformed and loot a Heart of Crush the Transformed. Take this to [Forge] to complete the challenge.
After you have completed the aforementioned prerequisite, simply talk to [Quake] and he will be able to provide you access.
To obtain access to the Ultimate Rank 2 zone, Sebilis, you must hand me 4 heads at once, which drop in Upper Guk & Lower Guk:
1. Ghoul Lord's Head.
2. Froglok King's Head.
3. Shin Lord's Head.
4. Ancient Croc's Head.
To obtain access to the the Ultimate Rank 3 zone, The Temple of Veeshan, you must obtain an Ultimate Legendary weapon. [Forge] can give you more information on how to accomplish this!
After you have your weapon, simply talk to [Quake] and he will be able to provide you access.
To obtain access to the Ultimate Rank 4 zone, Kael Drakkel, you must complete The Temple of Veeshan.
1. The Temple of Veeshan can be completed by returning to me with Ultimate Vulak's Scale.
To obtain access to the the Ultimate Rank 5 zone, Ultimate Sleeper's Tomb, you must complete Kael Drakkel.
1. Kael Drakkel can be completed by returning to me with Ultimate Kael Completion Pass.
Here are the Avatar Tasks available:
Avatar Task 1: [Obtain Access to Avatar Zones Rank 1].
Avatar Task 2: [Obtain Access to Avatar Zones Rank 2].
Avatar Task 3: [Obtain Access to Avatar Zones Rank 3].
Avatar Task 4: [Obtain Access to Avatar Zones Rank 4].
To obtain access to the Avatar Rank 1 zones, Blackburrow, Solusek A, and Mistmoore, you must complete Sleeper's Tomb and craft your Rank 6 Charm.
1. Sleeper's Tomb can be completed by returning to me with Ultimate Kerafyrm's Scale.
2. Consult with Arch Magus Phil, around the corner from me, about tackling Uber Megalodon. Uber Megalodon drops the item he requires to craft your Rank 6 Charm
After you have completed the aforementioned prerequisites, simply talk to [Quake] and he will be able to provide you access.
To obtain access to the Avatar Rank 2 zone, The Hole, you must hand me 3 heads at once:
1. Mayong's Head.
2. Fippy's Head.
3. Goblin King's Head.
To obtain access to the Avatar Rank 3 zone, The Tower of Frozen Shadow, you must complete The Hole and craft your Rank 7 Charm:
1. The Hole can be completed by returning to me with An Earthen Soulstone.
2. Consult with Measel in The Hole to complete your Rank 7 Charm.
To obtain access to the Avatar Rank 4 zone, Veeshan's Peak, you must complete The Tower of Frozen Shadow.
1. The Tower of Frozen Shadow can be completed by returning to me with Frozen Avatar Energy.
Here are the Demigod Tasks available:
Demigod Task 1: [Obtain Access to Demigod Zones Rank 1].
Demigod Task 2: [Obtain Access to Demigod Zones Rank 2].
Demigod Task 3: [Obtain Access to Demigod Zones Rank 3].
Demigod Task 4: [Obtain Access to Demigod Zones Rank 4].
To obtain access to the Demigod Rank 1 zones, Ocean of Tears and Unrest, you must complete Veeshan's Peak and your Rank 8 Charm.
1. Veeshan's Peak can be completed by returning to me with Heart of the Peak.
2. Consult with Measel in Veeshan's Peak to complete your Rank 8 Charm.
After you have completed the aforementioned prerequisites, simply talk to [Seism] and he will be able to provide you access.
To obtain access to the Demigod Rank 2 zone, The Plane of Fear, you must complete Ocean of Tears, Unrest, your Ultimate 2.0, and your Rank 9 Charm.
1. Ocean of Tears can be completed by returning to me with Coalesced Demigod Energy.
2. Unrest can be completed by returning to me with Ultimate Unrest Commendation.
3. Consult Cloud within the Ocean of Tears to complete your Ultimate 2.0.
4. Consult Arch Magus Phil within the Ocean of Tears to complete your Rank 9 Charm.
To obtain access to the Demigod Rank 3 zone, Velketor's Labyrinth, you must complete The Plane of Fear.
1. The Plane of Fear can be completed by returning to me with A Freshly Severed Head.
After you have completed the aforementioned prerequisite, simply talk to [Seism] and he will be able to provide you access.
To obtain access to the Demigod Rank 4 zone, The Goblin Vault, you must complete Velketor's Labyrinth and your Rank 10 Charm.
1. Velketor's Labyrinth can be completed by returning to me with Velketorian Essence.
2. Consult with Farnsworth in Velketor's Labyrinth to complete your Rank 10 Charm.
Here are the God Tasks available:
God Task 1: [Obtain Access to God Zones Rank 1].
God Task 2: [Obtain Access to God Zones Rank 2].
To obtain access to the God Rank 1 zones, The Elddar Forest and Old Kurn's Tower, you must complete The Goblin Vault.
1. The Goblin Vault can be completed by returning to me with Realm of the Gods Commendation.
2. After returning this to me, consult with [Illuminous] for further instructions.
God Tier 2 access can be achieved by returning to me with an Abomination Head.
You will need access to Crystallos in order to obtain this artifact.
